name: terminal-recipes
description: Manage categorized terminal commands and run, use, or copy them with variable support.

enumDescriptions: DeepSeek — very low cost, free tier available
Groq — free tier with fast inference
terminalRecipes.aiProvider.description: The AI provider to use for generating terminal commands.

terminalRecipes.aiModel.description: The model ID to use for the selected AI provider. Leave empty to use the provider's default model. This is set automatically when you select a model in AI Settings.

terminalRecipes.customSystemInstructions.description: Custom system instructions for the AI command generator. Leave empty to use the default instructions.

terminalRecipes.debugOutput.description: Enable detailed debug output in the VS Code Output Channel (Terminal Recipes). Logs internal operations such as AI requests, model listings, and other extension events.

enumDescriptions: On first open, uses the active editor's folder (or the first folder if no editor is active). After the user picks a folder from the dropdown, that choice is remembered across sessions for this workspace.
Always uses the folder of the currently active editor when opening the panel. Falls back to the last remembered selection if no editor is active.
Always uses the first folder in the workspace, regardless of the active editor. The folder selector dropdown is hidden.
terminalRecipes.multiRootFolderResolutio.description: Controls how the active workspace folder is determined when opening the panel in a multi-root workspace. Has no effect in single-folder workspaces.

scripts.test: node testing/check-syntax.js && node testing/normalize.test.js && node testing/terminal.test.js && node testing/exports.test.js && node testing/style-lint.test.js
